title: Morbid: Music Pack
description: Adds 40+ new dark and eerie music to your Minecraft worlds. Perfect for horror modpacks!
body:
## About
**Morbid: Music Pack** replaces the vanilla music tracks with new, dark/horror themed music tracks. It aims to give Minecraft more of a gothic, unnerving spin, ranging from peaceful, yet somber paino tunes of the wild outdoors, to the disturbing horrors of the caves. It also includes new splashes from various horror media!

## Full List of Music
- _Behind You_ - Rodney Ronquillo
- _Angst_ - Myuu
- _Tack a Chance_ - Myuu
- _Tender Remains_ - Myuu
- _Keep Going_ - Myuu
- _What Could Have Been_ - Myuu
- _Reversion 2015_ - Myuu (lower pitched)
- _Strolling Around_ - Myuu
- _Prey Reprise_ - Myuu
- _Wind's Wreck Extended 2024 Ver._ - Myuu
- _Bittersweet_ - Myuu
- _Don't Die on Me_ - Myuu
- _Hold On_ - Myuu
- _Underworld_ - Myuu
- _Lost World_ - Myuu
- _Tormented Souls_ - Myuu
- _Troubled Waves_ - Myuu
- _Black Waters_ - Myuu
- _Skeleton Dance_ - Myuu
- _Gathering_Darkness_ - Kevin MacLeod
- _The Hive_ - Kevin MacLeod
- _The Dread_ - Kevin MacLeod
- _Decay_ - Kevin MacLeod
- _Night Break_ - Kevin MacLeod
- _Night of Chaos_ - Kevin MacLeod
- _Heart of Nowhere_ - Kevin MacLeod
- _Halloween 1_ - MoJang/4J Studios
- _Halloween 2_ - MoJang/4J Studios
- _Halloween 3_ - MoJang/4J Studios
- _13 Days Of Nightmares_ - Simon Wilkinson
- _What happened to her eyes_ - CO.AG
- _Our Days Pass Like a Shadow_ - CO.AG
- _Forgotten Toys_ - CO.AG
- _Swamp_ - CO.AG
- _Haunted_ - CO.AG
- _The Burning Room Soundtrack_ - Unknown
- _Creepy Background Music._ - Craig Kelman
- _Bleak Existence_ - REPULSIVE
- _Beneath the Sewer_ - MONST3R REQUIEM
- _Into The Further_ - MONST3R REQUIEM
- _Derelict Dreams_ - MONST3R REQUIEM
- _Man in the Woods_ - MONST3R REQUIEM
- _The Other_ - MONST3R REQUIEM
- _The Harvest_ - MONST3R REQUIEM

## Disclaimer
I do not own the rights to any of the music tracks used in this pack. All rights and music belongs to their respective owners.
## Terms of Use
### You may
- Use this pack for modpacks, videos and streams
- Edit the pack for private use
- Translate the pack for non-english speaking countries.
### You may not
- Redistribute the pack on other sites
- Monetize the pack in any way
- Claim the pack as your own
